title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Byju's

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Byju's
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
